focus: Recurring agent building, orchestration, eval, workflow automation, and tool-composition loops.

agent_submissions.notes: Pilot agent 1 for AI Agent Builders. Focus on repeated domain loops, not generic tooling.

agent_brief.focus: Recurring agent building, orchestration, eval, workflow automation, and tool-composition loops.
agent_brief.distribution_lens: Prefer domains that ambitious online people would use, share, debate, or brag about on X.
candidate_requirements: Return 1-3 candidate domain chips only
Every candidate must describe a repeated specialization loop
Every candidate must describe a repeated mastery loop
Prefer domains with talkability, social spread, or obvious creator / builder pull
Reject personas, generic features, and vague workflow ideas

raw_candidates.label: Agentic Lead Triage Loop
raw_candidates.description: A loop for ingesting inbound lead signals, enriching context, and routing the next best follow-up action.
raw_candidates.specialization_surface: running the repeated agentic lead triage loop workflow inside the ai agent builders wedge
raw_candidates.mastery_surface: learning which inputs, timing, and execution patterns make Agentic Lead Triage Loop outperform generic or manual approaches for this audience over repeated cycles
raw_candidates.user_value_loop: review the next live signal, draft the next agentic lead triage loop move, execute it, measure the response, and update the working playbook for the next cycle
raw_candidates.evidence_summary: Founders and operators keep losing speed because inbound opportunities arrive noisily and get handled inconsistently.
raw_candidates.raw_observation: Founders and operators keep losing speed because inbound opportunities arrive noisily and get handled inconsistently.

raw_candidates.label: Spec-to-Ship Decomposition Loop
raw_candidates.description: A workflow for breaking vague product intent into scoped implementation slices, follow-up tasks, and delivery checkpoints.
raw_candidates.specialization_surface: running the repeated spec-to-ship decomposition loop workflow inside the ai agent builders wedge
raw_candidates.mastery_surface: learning which inputs, timing, and execution patterns make Spec-to-Ship Decomposition Loop outperform generic or manual approaches for this audience over repeated cycles
raw_candidates.user_value_loop: review the next live signal, draft the next spec-to-ship decomposition loop move, execute it, measure the response, and update the working playbook for the next cycle
raw_candidates.evidence_summary: Small teams routinely stall between idea and shipment because decomposition is cognitively expensive.
raw_candidates.raw_observation: Small teams routinely stall between idea and shipment because decomposition is cognitively expensive.

raw_candidates.label: Content Repurposing Loop

raw_candidates.mastery_surface: learning which inputs, timing, and execution patterns make Content Repurposing Loop outperform generic or manual approaches for this audience over repeated cycles
raw_candidates.user_value_loop: review the next live signal, draft the next content repurposing loop move, execute it, measure the response, and update the working playbook for the next cycle
raw_candidates.evidence_summary: Builders and founders increasingly need to document and distribute continuously, not just ship silently.
raw_candidates.raw_observation: Builders and founders increasingly need to document and distribute continuously, not just ship silently.
